name: NaroIQ
oneliner: ETF and fund issuance infrastructure that lets any bank or fintech launch its own ETFs — the 'Stripe-for-funds' European play. Seed $6.5M.
finserv: B2B distribution thesis; board includes operators from Trade Republic, N26, Liqid, Plaid. Magnetic-led seed; General Catalyst re-upping from pre-seed.
team: Ex-Flix / Forto operator founders; European fintech pedigree. Board density is the tell — this is a team with real distribution access to the neobanks that would be the first clients.
thesis: Product inversion doesn't always look like a consumer app. Tearing down the wholesale issuance layer so any distributor can offer thematic / factor / private-market baskets is a bigger prize than a single retail brand. NaroIQ is positioned to become the European issuance rail for everything that looks like an ETF.
